privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetic scenario where the target Rocket.Chat message configurations explicitly require enabling read receipts, enabling message editing with a 5-minute block limit, and disabling message deleting. These expected values perfectly match the instructions in the task description and the evaluation logic in verifier.py.
